overall_comment: Both figures are publishable: results.png is a well-structured 2x2 with labeled panels and the tight -20 story readable in under 10s; narrative.png clearly visualizes the pigeonhole argument (21 points in 10 rows forces 3 collinear on y=9). Minor polish notes only.

issues.issue: Callout arrow anchors to only one of three collinear points.
issues.fix: Drop the arrow and place the label mid-segment.

issues.issue: Two-line title mixes narrative with arithmetic on equal footing.
Metric value (-20) not surfaced on the figure.
Panel (a) log-scale y-axis cannot faithfully render 0 branches.
issues.fix: Switch to symlog with linthresh=1 or use a sentinel.

issues.issue: Same log-scale issue in panel (b) for 0.01 ms / 0 branches.
Panel (c) has inverted row axis without orientation hint.
Suptitle slightly small relative to figure.
